name: GKN plc
description: GKN plc is a British multinational automotive and aerospace components company headquartered in Redditch, Worcestershire. The company operates through three divisions: GKN Aerospace, GKN Driveline, and GKN Powder Metallurgy. It designs, manufactures, and services highly engineered components for the world's leading aircraft and vehicle manufacturers. In 2018, GKN was acquired by Melrose Industries.
